# List of supported EnOcean Equipment Profiles (EEPs)
<!-- This file is auto-generated via a pre-commit hook, do not edit manually. -->

All EEPs listed below have three metadata sensors `rssi` (the signal strength in dBm), `last_seen` (the timestamp of the last received telegram), and `telegram_count` (the number of telegrams received since startup) in addition to the listed Observations.

| RORG | FUNC | TYPE | Name | Telegrams | Observations |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| A5 | 02 | 01 | Temperature sensor, range -40.0°C to 0.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |
| A5 | 02 | 02 | Temperature sensor, range -30.0°C to 10.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |
| A5 | 02 | 03 | Temperature sensor, range -20.0°C to 20.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |
| A5 | 02 | 04 | Temperature sensor, range -10.0°C to 30.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |
| A5 | 02 | 05 | Temperature sensor, range 0.0°C to 40.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |
| A5 | 02 | 06 | Temperature sensor, range 10.0°C to 50.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |
| A5 | 02 | 07 | Temperature sensor, range 20.0°C to 60.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |
| A5 | 02 | 08 | Temperature sensor, range 30.0°C to 70.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |
| A5 | 02 | 09 | Temperature sensor, range 40.0°C to 80.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |

| A5 | 02 | 0B | Temperature sensor, range 60.0°C to 100.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |
| A5 | 02 | 10 | Temperature sensor, range -60.0°C to 20.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |
| A5 | 02 | 11 | Temperature sensor, range -50.0°C to 30.0°C | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |

| A5 | 04 | 02 | Temperature and humidity sensor, range -20.0°C to 60.0°C and 0% to 100% | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.HUMIDITY`: humidity (%)<br>`Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |

| A5 | 06 | 03 | Light sensor, 10-bit measurement, range 0lx to 1000lx | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.ILLUMINATION`: illumination (lx) |
| A5 | 06 | 04 | Curtain wall brightness sensor | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.ILLUMINATION`: illumination (lx)<br>`Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C) |
| A5 | 06 | 05 | Light sensor, range 0.0lx to 10200.0lx | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.ILLUMINATION`: illumination (lx) |
| A5 | 07 | 03 | Occupancy with supply voltage monitor and 10-bit illumination measurement | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.VOLTAGE`: voltage (V)<br>`Observable.ILLUMINATION`: illumination (lx)<br>`Observable.MOTION`: motion detected / no motion / uncertain |
| A5 | 08 | 01 | Light, temperature and occupancy sensor, range 0lx to 510lx, 0.0°C to 51.0°C and occupancy button | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.VOLTAGE`: voltage (V)<br>`Observable.ILLUMINATION`: illumination (lx)<br>`Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C)<br>`Observable.MOTION`: motion detected / no motion / uncertain<br>`Observable.OCCUPANCY_BUTTON`: occupancy button (pressed / released) |
| A5 | 08 | 01 | Light and occupancy sensor, range 0lx to 510lx, Eltako variant (FABH65S, FBH65, FBH65TF, FBH65SB, FBH55SB, FBHF65SB, F4USM61B) | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.VOLTAGE`: voltage (V)<br>`Observable.ILLUMINATION`: illumination (lx)<br>`Observable.MOTION`: motion detected / no motion / uncertain |
| A5 | 08 | 02 | Light, temperature and occupancy sensor, range 0lx to 1020lx, 0.0°C to 51.0°C and occupancy button | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.VOLTAGE`: voltage (V)<br>`Observable.ILLUMINATION`: illumination (lx)<br>`Observable.TEMPERATURE`: temperature (°C)<br>`Observable.MOTION`: motion detected / no motion / uncertain<br>`Observable.OCCUPANCY_BUTTON`: occupancy button (pressed / released) |

| D2 | 01 | 00 | Electronic switches and dimmers with local control – Type 0x00 – 1 channel, switching + dimming | `0x1`: Actuator set output<br>`0x2`: Actuator set local<br>`0x3`: Actuator status query<br>`0x4`: Actuator status response<br>`0x5`: Actuator set measurement<br>`0x6`: Actuator measurement query<br>`0x7`: Actuator measurement response<br>`0x8`: Actuator set pilot wire mode<br>`0x9`: Actuator pilot wire mode query<br>`0xa`: Actuator pilot wire mode response<br>`0xb`: Actuator set external interface settings<br>`0xc`: Actuator external interface settings query<br>`0xd`: Actuator external interface settings response<br>`0xf0`: Extended command, see ECID field / Actuator set dimming limits<br>`0xf1`: Extended command, see ECID field / Actuator dimming limits query<br>`0xf2`: Extended command, see ECID field / Actuator dimming limits response<br> | `Observable.SWITCH_STATE`: Observable.SWITCH_STATE<br>`Observable.ERROR_LEVEL`: Observable.ERROR_LEVEL<br>`Observable.PILOT_WIRE_MODE`: Observable.PILOT_WIRE_MODE<br>`Observable.ENERGY`: Observable.ENERGY<br>`Observable.POWER`: Observable.POWER<br>`Observable.OUTPUT_VALUE`: Observable.OUTPUT_VALUE |
| D2 | 01 | 01 | Electronic switches and dimmers with local control – Type 0x01 – 1 channel, switching | `0x1`: Actuator set output<br>`0x2`: Actuator set local<br>`0x3`: Actuator status query<br>`0x4`: Actuator status response<br>`0x5`: Actuator set measurement<br>`0x6`: Actuator measurement query<br>`0x7`: Actuator measurement response<br>`0x8`: Actuator set pilot wire mode<br>`0x9`: Actuator pilot wire mode query<br>`0xa`: Actuator pilot wire mode response<br>`0xb`: Actuator set external interface settings<br>`0xc`: Actuator external interface settings query<br>`0xd`: Actuator external interface settings response<br>`0xf0`: Extended command, see ECID field / Actuator set dimming limits<br>`0xf1`: Extended command, see ECID field / Actuator dimming limits query<br>`0xf2`: Extended command, see ECID field / Actuator dimming limits response<br> | `Observable.SWITCH_STATE`: Observable.SWITCH_STATE<br>`Observable.ERROR_LEVEL`: Observable.ERROR_LEVEL<br>`Observable.PILOT_WIRE_MODE`: Observable.PILOT_WIRE_MODE<br>`Observable.ENERGY`: Observable.ENERGY<br>`Observable.POWER`: Observable.POWER |
| D2 | 01 | 02 | Electronic switches and dimmers with local control – Type 0x02 – 1 channel, switching + dimming + metering | `0x1`: Actuator set output<br>`0x2`: Actuator set local<br>`0x3`: Actuator status query<br>`0x4`: Actuator status response<br>`0x5`: Actuator set measurement<br>`0x6`: Actuator measurement query<br>`0x7`: Actuator measurement response<br>`0x8`: Actuator set pilot wire mode<br>`0x9`: Actuator pilot wire mode query<br>`0xa`: Actuator pilot wire mode response<br>`0xb`: Actuator set external interface settings<br>`0xc`: Actuator external interface settings query<br>`0xd`: Actuator external interface settings response<br>`0xf0`: Extended command, see ECID field / Actuator set dimming limits<br>`0xf1`: Extended command, see ECID field / Actuator dimming limits query<br>`0xf2`: Extended command, see ECID field / Actuator dimming limits response<br> | `Observable.SWITCH_STATE`: Observable.SWITCH_STATE<br>`Observable.ERROR_LEVEL`: Observable.ERROR_LEVEL<br>`Observable.PILOT_WIRE_MODE`: Observable.PILOT_WIRE_MODE<br>`Observable.ENERGY`: Observable.ENERGY<br>`Observable.POWER`: Observable.POWER<br>`Observable.OUTPUT_VALUE`: Observable.OUTPUT_VALUE |

| D2 | 05 | 00 | Blinds control for position and angle, type 0x00 | `0x1`: Go to position and angle<br>`0x2`: Stop<br>`0x3`: Query position and angle<br>`0x4`: Reply position and angle<br> | `Observable.POSITION`: `position (0-127)`<br>`Observable.ANGLE`: `angle (0-127)`<br>`Observable.COVER_STATE`: `open`, `opening`, `closed`, `closing`, `stopped` |
| D2 | 20 | 02 | Fan control, type 0x02 | `0x0`: Fan control message<br>`0x1`: Fan status message<br> | — |
| F6 | 02 | 01 | Light and blind control - application style 1 | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `a0`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`a1`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`b0`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`b1`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`ab0`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`ab1`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`a0b1`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`a1b0`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released` |
| F6 | 02 | 02 | Light and blind control - application style 2 | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `a0`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`a1`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`b0`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`b1`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`ab0`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`ab1`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`a0b1`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released`<br>`a1b0`: `pushed`, `clicked`, `double-clicked`, `held`, `released` |
| F6 | 10 | 00 | Window handle | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.WINDOW_STATE`: window state (open / tilted / closed) |
| F6 | 10 | 00 | Window handle (Eltako variant) | `0x0` (single message EEP) | `Observable.WINDOW_STATE`: window state (open / tilted / closed) |
